author: Bastions
text:
First-class Reject { reason } propose outcome, wired to failure policy

Add a third native propose branch (reject) carrying a reason and no Task state (SPEC §8.1), distinct from conflict (retried) and Other (wire failure). New AttemptClass::Reject skips retry and routes by failure policy: Required => Err with plugin+reason verbatim, best-effort => Skipped, gating => Staged.

Scope boundary per SPEC §14: this delivers the negotiation-primitive mapping; command-level abort/rollback of a required Err is bl-2bf7 (lifecycle commands still discard the dispatch result by design). Abort-with-reason conformance lands at the primitive; the e2e pins the wired surface.

Relocated cfg(test) helpers and extracted a shared ClosureProtocol to kill duplication and stay under the 300-line limit. Suite green, clippy clean, 100% coverage.
